ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2008 Continued To Apr-14-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 4/14/2008 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes, CSR#12365. (212)

Ntc Ofmtn & Mtn For Order Compelling Appearance At Deposition & For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Gabriel's Horn's Motion For Order Compelling Appearance At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for his deposition, to be noticed by Defendant, and to complete that deposition no later than January 18, 2008. Plaintiff's failure to appear for his deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $490, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
